rationale: Based on feedback from generation 6: the agent crashed more often after relaxing thresholds and adding a survival bonus. Revert to stricter thresholds (position<0.12, velocity<0.12, angle<0.12), increase crash penalty to -25, remove survival bonus, keep terminal success at +500, and re-add progress reward to distance_reward. Per-step penalties remain reduced (distance -0.25, velocity -0.25, angle -0.5) as they showed minor improvement.

components.description: Base distance penalty (-0.25 per unit distance) plus progress reward (0.5 * reduction in distance)
Reduced penalty for high linear speed

components.expression: float(done) * (500.0 if (np.sqrt(next_obs[0]**2 + next_obs[1]**2) < 0.12 and np.sqrt(next_obs[2]**2 + next_obs[3]**2) < 0.12 and abs(next_obs[4]) < 0.12) else -25.0)
components.description: Large positive reward for successful landing (+500) with stricter thresholds, crash penalty (-25), no survival bonus
